mapper.select: SELECT r.id, t.task_no AS taskNo, f.name AS fieldName, d.code AS droneCode, r.actual_start_time AS actualStartTime, r.actual_end_time AS actualEndTime, r.actual_area_mu AS actualAreaMu, r.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, r.result, r.exception_remark AS exceptionRemark FROM operation_record r INNER JOIN operation_task t ON r.task_id = t.id INNER JOIN field_plot f ON t.field_id = f.id INNER JOIN drone d ON r.drone_id = d.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
